# S&P Septic & Excavating Inc.

## Site Description
S&P Septic & Excavating Inc. is a family-owned septic contractor serving Warren, Ohio and Trumbull County since 2021. The company provides complete septic services including tank pumping, drain field repair, new system installation, perk testing, excavation, and camera inspections. Licensed, BBB Accredited A+, and fully insured, they serve residential and commercial customers across Trumbull, Mahoning, and Portage Counties.

## Company Details
- Name: S&P Septic and Excavating Inc.
- Phone: (330) 979-3930
- Email: info@spseptic.com
- Address: 2900 Elm Rd NE, Warren, OH 44483
- URL: https://spseptic.com
- Category: Septic System Installation and Excavation Services
- Service Area: Warren, Ohio and Trumbull County (also Mahoning and Portage Counties)

## Top Services
- Septic System Installation
- Septic System Repair
- Excavation Services
- Septic Pumping and Cleaning
- Perk and Leach Field Services
- Camera Inspections
